hero.subtitle: Artys is the first fair streaming platform where every fan who supports an artist via Royaltips generates monthly income — and shares their success.
hero.stat1_body: Every Royaltip you give to your favorite artist guarantees them stable monthly income — far beyond what streaming would ever have paid.
hero.stat2_body: Where it would take 1 million streams for an artist to earn $3,000/month, 500 Superfans like you can do exactly the same — without the music being streamed once.

royaltips.title: A tip that
royaltips.subtitle: Royaltips™ are not donations. They are monthly subscriptions that transform your passion into recurring income for the artist — and give you access to their universe in return.
royaltips.step1_desc: Every artist on Artys has a Backstage — their exclusive community space. Subscribe to access the intimate universe of your artist.
royaltips.step2_desc: From $10/month, your subscription is converted into a Royaltip. The artist receives their income every month, directly, without intermediary.
royaltips.step3_desc: The most active fans are rewarded: exclusive content, project access, revenue sharing, smart contracts. You become a co-creator.
royaltips.feat1_desc: Private posts, exclusive lives, behind-the-scenes, polls, early access content. You're in the inner circle.
royaltips.feat2_desc: Participate in Guild missions: sharing, content creation, recruitment. Every action counts and is rewarded.
royaltips.feat3_desc: Fans who grow the Guild receive bonus Royaltips. The more you contribute, the more you earn.
royaltips.feat4_desc: On certain projects (video, EP, drop), you can co-invest and receive a share of revenue via smart contract.

problem.title: Streaming
problem.p1: Streaming generates over $20 billion per year globally. Yet the vast majority of independent artists cannot live from it.
problem.p2: When you listen to your favorite artist on streaming, they receive less than $0.004. For them to earn minimum wage, you'd need to listen on repeat for years.
problem.ia_title: ⚡ AI is making it worse in 2025
problem.ia_2: Spotify deleted 75 million spam tracks in one year
problem.ia_3: Deezer reports 50,000 AI uploads per day on its platform
problem.ia_4: Each artist's revenue share mechanically dilutes with equal plays
problem.card1_title: What you earn them per stream
problem.card1_desc: Less than a cent per listen. Even if you play their full album every day.
problem.card2_desc: The vast majority of creators you love cannot live from their music.
problem.card3_title: The global catalog doubles in 3 years
problem.card3_desc: With generative AI, your artists see their income diluted even if your support stays the same.

comparison.title: What your support is
comparison.subtitle: Compare the real impact of your streaming vs. a monthly Royaltip.

governance.title: Become a
governance.p1: Artys has delegated the governance of its ecosystem to The Ark of Culture — an independent federation bringing together artists, professionals and fans.
governance.p2: By joining the federation, you vote on ecosystem decisions, access exclusive services and help build a fair music industry governed by those who make it live.

cta_section.title_end: An artist living from their music.
cta_section.subtitle: Be among the first fans to join the Artys ecosystem. Get early access to the Backstages of your favorite artists — and truly change their lives.
cta_section.note: ✦ Orchestrated launch — Join thousands of fans preparing for June 2026
cta_section.field_artist_placeholder: Who do you want to support first?
cta_section.form_success_body: We'll reach out before anyone else at launch. You'll be among the first fans to access Backstages — see you soon ✦
cta_section.form_consent: By signing up, you agree to receive Artys news. Zero spam, unsubscribe in 1 click.

footer.tagline: The first fair streaming platform where artists and fans co-create and co-earn — governed by its members.
